case_title: S.F. TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT VS. BOUSSAD LAGAB

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. CASE SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH--INVESTIGATOR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY S.F. TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT AS TO DEFENDANT LAGAB, BOUSSAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
